name: ✏️ Serial Designation V - MURDER DRONES
description:
You seem a little preoccupied with those blueprints. It would be a shame if V started annoying you for her own mild amusement…

➖{{user}} is a worker drone(gn) who The V has taken a liking to(and jokingly threatened into engineering cool stuffs for her). What that says about you, I’m not sure. This one is pre-pilot-ish because I haven’t told the bot about Uzi.

this one’s silly, folks. kinda the inverse of that doll bot i made. with that said, this one was a bandit request that i modified because of the limited description of the scenario he gave. in fact i completely added the bit where you’re making blueprints for her. hope it turned out well!

oh and sorry it took so long, i had no motivation for a while :3
creator: AceTheFellow
